name: GitHub: Branch Protection Rules - Force Pushes Allowed
query:
MATCH p=(:GH_BranchProtectionRule {allows_force_pushes: true})-[:GH_ProtectedBy]->(:GH_Branch)
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
description: Finds branches where force pushes are allowed. Force pushes can rewrite commit history, potentially hiding malicious changes or destroying audit trails.
